title: Nieto de Raúl Castro dice que está listo para negociar con Trump el futuro de Cuba
shortDescription: Raúl Guillermo Rodríguez Castro, nieto y estrecho colaborador de Raúl Castro, afirma en una entrevista exclusiva con USA TODAY que está preparado para asumir un papel de liderazgo en Cuba y negociar directamente con el presidente Donald Trump sobre el futuro de la isla.

title: Exclusive: Young Castro wants Trump to deal, he says in first US interview
shortDescription: Raul Castro's right-hand man says he’s ready to lead Cuba and negotiate its future with U.S. President Donald Trump, in exclusive USA Today interview.

title: White House report targets Smithsonian history museum leadership
shortDescription: A White House report accuses leaders of the Smithsonian Institution’s National Museum of American History of embracing "extreme political activism."

title: House GOP leader says Congress should restrict birthright citizenship
shortDescription: Speaker of the House Mike Johnson said that Congress should consider a bill to limit birthright citizenship and that it would advance "immediately."

title: Trump says Reflecting Pool is 'crystal clear,' citing old X posts
shortDescription: President Trump shared several posts on Truth Social touting "crystal clear" waters at the Reflecting Pool. Those posts, however, were from June.

title: Trump called FIFA president before US star's suspension was lifted
shortDescription: President Trump called FIFA President Gianni Infantino to urge a review of Folarin Balogun's red card before the US star's suspension was reversed.

title: Mallory McMorrow drops out of Michigan's closely watched Senate race
shortDescription: The state senator from outside Detroit had been at or near the lead in polling earlier but had fallen back considerably.

title: Trump aide pressed to condemn White nationalist group in tense interview
shortDescription: A member of President Donald Trump's cabinet was pressed to condemn the White supremacist group Patriot Front, which gathered in Washington on July 4.

title: Trump's bashing Dems as 'Godless communists.' Will it matter in the midterms?
shortDescription: Railing against a new crop of Democratic Socialist and progressive candidates is Trump's latest fight. Will it matter in the midterms?

title: Trump blends history, military, politics: 7 takeaways from the 250th
shortDescription: Here are seven takeaways from July 4 celebrations, including Trump's views on history, the military and election legislation.

title: Trump's view of America's 250th, praising the founders − and himself
shortDescription: Delayed but not deterred by thunderstorms, the president used the nation's milestone anniversary for a personal and political celebration. That's new.

title: Trump marks America’s 250th with speech
shortDescription: President Donald Trump gave a late-night address at the National Mall to mark America’s 250th anniversary.

title: Judge rejects Trump bid to delay paying $5.8M to E. Jean Carroll
shortDescription: A judge rejected Trump's request to delay his response to E. Jean Carroll's demand for the $5 million she won in a civil lawsuit, plus interest.

title: Trump's July 4 speech: Time, livestream, updates
shortDescription: Storms delayed President Trump's July 4 speech in Washington, DC but organizers say it's still on. Here's when it starts and how to watch live.

title: Trump marks America's 250th with speech and colossal fireworks show
shortDescription: President Donald Trump took the stage after the National Mall was evacuated hours earlier due to weather.

title: Trump's remarks at Mt. Rushmore
shortDescription: The America 250 celebration at Mt. Rushmore ended with a fireworks show after President Donald Trump's remarks.

title: Trump pokes fun at himself, roasts Obama in children's podcast
shortDescription: The 24-page book “Presidents Play!” features illustrations showing how presidents, despite their hectic schedule, unwind on the White House grounds

title: Trump pardons 6 air-pollution violators
shortDescription: President Trump announced he was pardoning six people prosecuted by the Biden administration for clean-air related offences, but did not name them.
